Created attachment 189909
sysutils/cbsd: update to 11.1.12

Update to 11.1.12

Changes: https://github.com/cbsd/cbsd/releases/tag/v11.1.12

+ add pkgconf dependencies to fix the problem when SQLite3 compiled with ICU:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=214551
